{% set doc = frappe.get_doc("Exit Interview", name) %}
{% if app_logo %} {% else %}
COMPANY
{% endif %}
{{ doc.company }}
Exit Interview
{{ doc.name }} Interview Date: {{ frappe.format_date(doc.date) if doc.date else '-' }} Relieving Date: {{ frappe.format_date(doc.relieving_date) if doc.relieving_date else '-' }}
{{ doc.workflow_state or doc.status }}
Employee Details
Employee Name Employee ID Department Designation
{{ doc.employee_name or '-' }} {{ doc.employee or '-' }} {{ doc.department or '-' }} {{ doc.designation or '-' }}
Date of Joining Relieving Date Supervisor Final Decision
{{ frappe.format_date(doc.date_of_joining) if doc.date_of_joining else '-' }} {{ frappe.format_date(doc.relieving_date) if doc.relieving_date else '-' }} {{ doc.custom_supervisor_name or '-' }} {{ doc.employee_status or '-' }}
1. Reason for Leaving
Briefly state your reasons for leaving the company. {{ doc.custom_1_briefly_state_your_reasons_for_leaving_the_company or '-' }}
2. Job Experience
What did you like most about your job and IntelliSOFT in general? {{ doc.custom_like_most or '-' }}
What did you like least or did not impress you? {{ doc.custom_least_like or '-' }}
3. Contribution
Did your efforts make an important contribution to the company in general? {{ doc.custom_a_company_in_general or '-' }}
Did your efforts make an important contribution to your department? {{ doc.custom_b_your_department or '-' }}
4. Satisfaction Ratings (0 = Very Dissatisfied  ·  5 = Very Satisfied)
Area Rating Comment / Suggestion
a) Working Relationship with Supervisor {{ doc.custom_a_working_relationship_with_your_supervisor_ or '-' }} {{ doc.custom_explain or '-' }}
b) Career Progress {{ doc.custom_b_career_progress_what_can_we_do_to_make_this_better or '-' }} {{ doc.custom_what_can_we_do_to_make_this_better or '-' }}
c) Working Environment {{ doc.custom_c_working_environment or '-' }} {{ doc.custom_comment or '-' }}
d) Receptivity of Management to Ideas {{ doc.custom_d_receptivity_of_management_to_your_ideas or '-' }} {{ doc.custom_comment_management or '-' }}
5. Job & Company Culture
What were the best and worst aspects of your job? {{ doc.custom_what_were_the_best_and_worst_aspects_of_your_job or '-' }}
How would you describe the company culture? {{ doc.custom_how_would_you_describe_the_company_culture or '-' }}
6. Workplace Relationships
How was your relationship with your manager and colleagues? {{ doc.custom_relationship or '-' }}
7. Suggestions for Improvement
What suggestions do you have for improving the work environment or company culture? {{ doc.custom_suggestions or '-' }}
8. Overall Experience
What was your overall experience at ICL? {{ doc.custom_experience or '-' }}
{% if doc.interview_summary %}
Interviewer Notes
Interview Summary {{ doc.interview_summary }}
{% endif %}
Employee Signature  ·  {{ doc.employee_name or '' }}
